select_when: A vivid story, category label, or familiar prototype is overpowering statistical reasoning in a forecast or judgment.
The team is leaning on resemblance or stereotype logic instead of reference-class evidence and base-rate correction.
A recommendation depends on forcing a handoff from intuitive categorization to explicit outside-view checking before action.
Problem solvers are at risk of declaring that they have seen this pattern before and skipping verification of whether the old frame still fits.
avoid_when: The judgment already rests on explicit outside-view evidence and the model would only restate a bias warning without changing the decision path.
The model is being used to criticize simplification itself rather than the specific move from surface similarity to unsupported causal confidence.

curation_notes.summary: Kept the model centered on stereotype-driven pattern matching, base-rate neglect, and forced outside-view correction rather than widening it into generic anti-bias language.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor heuristics-and-biases sprawl beyond the raw source's stronger base-rate, WYSIATI, and false-pattern-recognition surface.
Did not add higher-order composition fields because this batch remains Wave 1 to Wave 3 only.
open_questions: The output type compresses a source that spans communication shortcuts, hiring judgments, and forecasting errors.

select_when.note: The source explicitly says the model is most useful when vivid story or resemblance logic overrides statistical reasoning and when a base-rate correction handoff is needed.

avoid_when.note: The second avoid condition is conservative normalization of the source's distinction between useful simplification and dangerous false pattern recognition.

input_type.note: The source clearly activates on prototype-driven judgment problems, while the compact type label is reviewed normalization.

output_type.note: The raw source yields outside-view and base-rate correction behavior, but the typed output label is a compact reviewed abstraction.

reasoning_types.note: The model naturally works through probability correction and counterfactual challenge of the favored story, while the taxonomy labels remain reviewed normalization.
